_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces at the default 'wow with evidence' gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why in an ADR. Results rank by wow = surprise x trust, gated at trust >= 0.50 (ADR 0006). After the seed-QID repair (16 hallucinated QIDs corrected + co-occurrence rebuilt), Roman Empire tops out at Qin Shi Huang, the First Emperor of China, in 3 sourced hops. All default results are confident (possibly = false).
